summary: Completed testing of 5 UI improvements. All backend API tests passed (11/11). Frontend UI tests verified all features working correctly: Hero CTA button behavior (auth modal when not logged in, navigate to /dashboard when logged in), banner carousel with 'En savoir plus' button, 'Nous contacter' sidebar button, 'Publier vos besoins' button, and Admin CMS banner management.

issues: Unicode characters showing as escape sequences in header text (Banni\u00E8res d\u00E9filantes) - cosmetic issue only

passed_tests: GET /api/site-settings/banners - returns banners list (empty by default, now has 2 test banners)
POST /api/admin/site-settings/banners - admin can save banner slides
GET /api/admin/site-settings/banners - admin can retrieve banners
Admin banner endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
POST /api/messages - user can send contact message
POST /api/messages - user can send publish needs message (structured content)
GET /api/messages - user can retrieve their messages
Messages endpoints require authentication
GET /api/admin/stats - returns comprehensive statistics
GET /api/offers - returns list of offers (20 offers)
GET /api/offers/{id} - returns single offer
Hero 'Get Started Now' button: opens auth modal when NOT logged in
Hero 'Get Started Now' button: navigates to /dashboard when logged in (text changes to 'Explore Programs')
Hero 'Free Consultation' button: scrolls to #contact section
Banner 'En savoir plus' button: shows all programs (triggers showAllResults)
'Nous contacter' sidebar button: opens auth modal when NOT logged in
'Nous contacter' sidebar button: opens contact modal when logged in
'Commencer' (Publish needs) button: opens auth modal when NOT logged in
'Commencer' (Publish needs) button: opens publish needs modal when logged in
Admin CMS: 'Bannières' section appears in sidebar menu
Admin CMS: Banner management - can add a new banner with image URL and title
Admin CMS: Banner management - shows existing banners with edit/delete options
Frontend homepage loads correctly with all 5 new features functional
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 UI improvements implemented correctly and working as expected
Banner management CRUD operations working via API and Admin CMS
Contact and Publish Needs modals properly require authentication
Hero CTA button correctly handles both authenticated and unauthenticated states
Smooth scroll to contact section working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test banners during testing (Test Banner, Playwright Test Banner)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 UI improvements verified working: 1) Hero CTA button behavior based on auth state, 2) Banner carousel with admin management, 3) 'En savoir plus' shows all programs, 4) 'Nous contacter' opens contact modal (requires login), 5) 'Publier vos besoins' opens needs form (requires login). Admin CMS has 'Bannières' section for managing carousel slides. All modals properly check authentication before opening.

hero_cta_button.logged_in: Navigates to /dashboard, button text changes to 'Explore Programs'

banner_carousel.en_savoir_plus_button: Triggers showAllResults to display all programs
banner_carousel.admin_management: Full CRUD via Admin CMS 'Bannières' section

nous_contacter_sidebar.logged_in: Opens contact modal with subject/message form

publier_vos_besoins.logged_in: Opens publish needs modal with study field, level, country, budget, description fields
